d:
When Vala casts the skill at an empty tile, she jumps to the tile and switches to Skyblaster Mode. She prioritizes shooting the marked enemy, dealing [[450%]]<ATK> damage and stunning them for [[4]]s. 
When Vala casts the skill at an enemy, she switches to Sword Mode. She rushes to slash the target, dealing [[420%]]<ATK> true damage. And all her normal attacks become melee attacks. 
In Auto Battle, Vala switches to Sword Mode and prioritizes the marked enemy if their HP ratio is lower than [[50%]]. Otherwise, she switches to Skyblaster Mode to shoot the enemy and remains at a safe distance.
In Skyblaster Mode, Vala deals [[40%]] more damage to enemy with a HP ratio higher than [[50%]].
In Sword Mode, Vala's normal attacks and skills deal extra damage to enemy with a HP ratio lower than [[50%]]. Damage dealt equals to [[10%]] of the target's lost HP, up to [[300%]] of Vala's ATK.
In Skyblaster Mode, Vala deals [[45%]] more damage to enemy with a HP ratio higher than [[50%]].
In Sword Mode, Vala's normal attacks and skills deal extra damage to enemy with a HP ratio lower than [[50%]]. Damage dealt equals to [[12%]] of the target's lost HP, up to [[300%]] of Vala's ATK.

Vala sends a notice to mark the farthest enemy when a battle starts. She prioritizes attacking the noticed enemy, absorbing [[90]] Energy for each hit. When the noticed enemy is defeated, Vala sends a new notice to mark the farthest enemy if she is in Skyblaster Mode or to the nearest enemy if she is in Sword Mode.
Increases Energy absorbed to [[100]].
Increases Energy absorbed to [[110]].
Increases Energy absorbed to [[120]].

In Skyblaster Mode, Vala shoots with an exclusive anesthetic bullet, dealing [[230%]]<ATK> damage to an enemy and reducing their Haste by [[60]] for [[8]]s. 
In Sword Mode, Vala hits the enemy [[3]] times, dealing [[100%]]<ATK> damage each hit and stunning them for [[1]]s.
Increases bullet damage to [[240%]]<ATK> or each sword hit damage to [[105%]]<ATK>.
Increases bullet damage to [[250%]]<ATK> or each sword hit damage to [[110%]]<ATK>.
Increases bullet damage to [[260%]]<ATK> or each sword hit damage to [[115%]]<ATK>.
Vala increases her ATK by [[9%]] during battle. She also gains an extra [[3%]] ATK every time a non-summoned enemy is defeated.
Vala increases her ATK by [[12%]] during battle. She also gains an extra [[4%]] ATK every time a non-summoned enemy is defeated.
Vala increases her ATK by [[15%]] during battle. She also gains an extra [[5%]] ATK every time a non-summoned enemy is defeated.

Vala blends into the darkness when the marked enemy is defeated, making her untargetable until all other allies are defeated. During this time, her movement speed increases by [[60%]] and Haste by [[80]] for [[10]]s.
Increases her movement speed by [[80%]] and Haste by [[100]] when in the darkness.
Recovers [[40%]] of her max HP when the marked enemy is defeated.
Increases her movement speed by [[90%]] and Haste by [[120]] when in the darkness.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, gains [[15]] Penetration and [[15]] Haste for [[5]]s when a battle starts and when [[assisting or defeating]] an enemy.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Haste, 10 DEF Penetration.

d: Vala increases her damage dealt to the marked enemy by [[10%]].

Enemies marked by Notice Beforehand deal [[20%]] less damage. While in Skyblaster mode, Vala gains [[100]] more Energy every time she attacks the marked enemy. In Sword mode, she instead gains an extra [[30]] Execution.
